name: Dimitra Kirani
quote: A very nice tattoo from a very good artist, I am very satisfied, it is worth a visit!!

name: Vilde Gran
quote: Min bestemor fikk sin første tatovering i en alder av 80år, alltid drømt om en blå sommerfugl tatovering og hun ble så fornøyd! Skånsom behandling og fantastisk tatovering! 10/10

name: Zimzky91
quote: Results came out great. Guy is professional and good at what he does. Made 1,5 hours feel like 30 minutes.

name: Thimio Kote
quote: Filip did an excellent job on my tattoo. He was professional, friendly, and made me feel comfortable throughout the whole process. The attention to detail was impressive, and the final result exceeded my expectations. Highly recommend Filip at Infinity Tattoo if you’re looking for quality work and a great experience.

name: Lena B
quote: Meget fornøyd. Fikk meg en ny tatovering i farge og oppussing av 30 år gammel tatovering som ble bedre enn ny.

name: Wiktor
quote: En helt fantastisk opplevelse fra start til slutt! Jeg kom inn med en løs idé, og han tok seg god tid til å lytte, komme med innspill, og designe et motiv som overgikk alle forventningene mine, det endelige resultatet er utrolig!! Studioet er strøkent, og har en utrolig god og avslappet atmosfære. Renslighet og hygiene er åpenbart i høysetet her. Anbefaler det virkelig til alle, spesielt til de som skal ta sin første tatovering og ser etter skikkelig kvalitet!

name: Σεβαστη Μαναι
quote: Fantastisk opplevelse! Studioet var rent og veldig stor, Fillipos er veldig profesjonell og utrolig vennlig og hyggelig. Jeg følte meg komfortabel hele tiden. Resultatet overgikk forventningene mine. Jeg er kjempefornøyd med tatoveringen min og vil absolutt anbefale dette studioet til alle som ønsker arbeid av høy kvalitet.

name: Armando Qoku
quote: Honestly one of the best tattoo experiences I’ve had at Infinity Tattoo Studio. Filippos is not only an amazing artist but also a really great person, so I felt comfortable from the start. I went in to finish my half sleeve and we actually managed to complete the whole thing in one day. It was a long session, but the time flew by because the atmosphere was so relaxed and easygoing. He paid crazy attention to detail and you can tell he genuinely cares about getting the best possible result. The studio was super clean, had a great vibe, and the whole experience felt both professional and friendly at the same time. The final result came out even better than I imagined. Definitely coming back for my next tattoos.

name: Sophie San
quote: Hadde en utrolig bra opplevelse hos Infinity Tattoo! Tatovøren var super hyggelig, profesjonell og veldig flink på fineline. Han var nøye med detaljene og tok seg god tid så resultatet ble helt perfekt. Atmosfæren i studioet var også veldig behagelig og man føler seg virkelig tatt vare på. Kunne ikke vært mer fornøyd med tatoveringen min, anbefales 100%!

name: Tobias Nyberg
quote: Super fornøyd med min cover up tattoo hos AJ.👍🏼 Anbefales på det høyeste!

name: Armando Mukaj
quote: I had an amazing experience at this studio, Filip did my half sleeve in a one-day session, and I couldn’t be happier with the result. The detail, precision, and overall artistry were absolutely incredible. From start to finish, Filip was professional, patient, and fully dedicated to making the tattoo perfect. The final piece exceeded all my expectations with super clean work with amazing details throughout the entire sleeve. Highly recommend Filip and Infinity Tattoo to anyone looking for top-quality tattoos and an awesome experience!

name: Burim Hasanaj
quote: Jeg dro til Infinity Tattoo for en konsultasjonstime hvor vi planla tatoveringen og ble enige om pris på forhånd. Jeg hadde en full sleeve som trengte mye forbedring, i tillegg til en tatovering på skulderen som måtte dekkes med en cover-up. Filip kom med helt sinnsykt gode ideer og klarte virkelig å gjøre armen min hel igjen. Resultatet ble mye bedre enn jeg hadde sett for meg, og man merker med en gang hvor dyktig og kreativ han er som artist. Han er også en veldig rolig og hyggelig type som virkelig bryr seg om jobben sin, og er utrolig opptatt av at resultatet skal bli så bra som overhodet mulig. Anbefales på det sterkeste til alle som ønsker kvalitet, gode ideer og en tatoveringsartist som faktisk legger sjela si i arbeidet. Jeg kommer definitivt tilbake igjen for flere tatoveringer.

name: Esksch
quote: Supert resultat, AJ er en dyktig tatovør👏 Anbefales!

name: Theo 。Kraft
quote: Had an amazing experience at Infinity Tattoo in Lørenskog! The studio was clean, comfortable, and very professional from start to finish. Filip was incredibly skilled, detail-oriented, and took the time to fully understand exactly what I wanted. The result turned out even better than I imagined! You can really tell he’s passionate about his work, and I felt safe and comfortable throughout the whole process. Highly recommended to anyone thinking about getting a tattoo. I will definitely be coming back!

name: Daniel
quote: Amazing tattoo shop, great service and crazy fine line work by AJ!

name: Oscar Tang
quote: Got a tatto from AJ and i am very pleased with it! 10/10 would recommend

name: Panagiota Kosta
quote: Jeg hadde en utrolig bra opplevelse hos dette tattoveringsstudioet! Dette var min aller første tatovering, så jeg var ganske nervøs i starten, men eieren var kjempehyggelig, profesjonell og veldig opptatt av at jeg skulle føle meg komfortabel hele tiden. Han spurte flere ganger om det gikk bra med meg, om jeg hadde vondt, og passet virkelig på at jeg ikke skulle føle ubehag under tatoveringen. Hele opplevelsen føltes trygg og avslappende, og resultatet ble helt perfekt. Man merker virkelig at han bryr seg om kundene sine og legger stolthet i arbeidet sitt. Jeg kunne ikke vært mer fornøyd, og jeg skal definitivt tilbake til han for min neste tatovering!

name: Elise Pedersen
quote: ALDRIN er driiiit flink tatovør, er sååå fornøyd med hvor presis han er og ikke minst ble tatoveringen super clean! anbefales på d sterkeste!!!!

name: Tom Sorin
quote: Got a tattoo by AJ, and I’m honestly so impressed. I was a bit unsure about getting a tattoo in Norway after coming from L.A., but AJ completely exceeded my expectations. The work was professional, clean, and exactly what I wanted. Highly recommended!

name: Alkis Prekas
quote: Amazing work.i think I found my artist

name: Daniel Loftus
quote: Beste tattoo studio ! Artisten er kjempe hyggelig og yter den beste servicen. Vil du ha tattoo av høyeste kvalitet, er dette stedet 😊

name: Kengadevy Kanapathipillai
quote: Fast response, nicely done work. Would recommend going here.

name: yazan
quote: I had an amazing experience at Infinity Tattoo! Filip did an incredible job covering up an old tattoo I wasn’t happy with, and I honestly couldn’t be more pleased with the result. He was professional, detail-oriented, and really took the time to understand exactly what I wanted. The new design looks clean, sharp, and completely transformed the old piece. You can tell he takes pride in his work. Highly recommend Infinity Tattoo and especially Filip if you’re looking for quality and skill!

name: Albijon Mangjolli
quote: I had an amazing experience at Infinity Tattoo Studio! The artist did such a beautiful job on my fine line lettering tattoo. The lines are incredibly clean, precise, and delicate exactly what I was hoping for. They took their time to make sure the placement, font, and spacing were perfect before starting, which made me feel really comfortable and confident. The studio was spotless, professional, and had a very welcoming atmosphere. You can tell they really care about both quality and customer experience. If you’re looking for fine line letters or detailed work, I highly recommend Infinity Tattoo Studio!

name: Domeniko salla
quote: I did a full Japanese koi sleeve at Infinity Tattoo Studio in Lørenskog and I’m extremely happy with the result. The artist really understands Japanese tattoo style and builds the design properly to fit the arm. What I really liked is that a lot of the work was done freehand, which made the sleeve flow perfectly with my body. The koi design, shading and linework are very clean, and you can see the attention to detail. The whole process felt professional from start to finish. If you are looking for a Japanese sleeve or Japanese style tattoo near Oslo, I can definitely recommend this studio. Great experience, good communication and high quality work.

name: Molly Hansen
quote: the best tattoo artist I’ve ever had! works beautifully and very precisely. i absolutely recommend to anyone with good taste🔥

name: Vasilis Vantas
quote: Perfectionist 👌

name: Aksel Johansen
quote: Great studio. Bright, clean and centrally located. So happy that I chose to go here and get the tattoo that has a deep meaning for me. The artist is very good, he listens to your idea, and is so dedicated and so good with the details. Highly recommend this place for your tattoo!

name: Leonardo Hyso
quote: Cool person very talented and professional.Clean environment definitely recommended.

name: mcevro123
quote: Veldig fornøyd med opplevelsen! Tatovøren er en hyggelig og imøtekommende type som får deg til å føle deg komfortabel fra start. Han kommer med gode forslag og tips underveis som faktisk løfter designet og gjør tatoveringen enda bedre enn forventet. Jobber svært detaljert og viser tydelig høy faglig dyktighet. Anbefales på det sterkeste!

name: silian branden
quote: Professionell, veldig bra kommunikasjon og helt fantastisk flink! Anbefales på det sterkeste

name: Manos Dem
quote: The Best!

name: Αλέξανδρος Ζιντρο
quote: Although the tattoo is not yet finished, the detail is visible. The artist has worked hard and has shown amazing dedication to what he does, all the tools are spotless clean, as is the entire tattoo studio.Very good communication and he helps you a lot in designing the tattoo until you have the perfect result. The whole session was enjoyable and I highly recommend it!💯

name: dilena sideri
quote: He is very good at fine line and I had a very nice experience thought the whole process

name: Nora El Alfy
quote: Really good artist!

name: Monika Kuznik
quote: I highly recommend this tattoo studio! The owner is incredibly kind, welcoming, and extremely talented. From the moment you walk in, the atmosphere is relaxed and friendly, which makes the whole experience very comfortable. The attention to detail and quality of the tattoo is truly amazing – you can tell a lot of passion and skill goes into every piece. I’m very happy with my tattoo and will definitely come back. If you’re looking for a great artist and a studio with a fantastic vibe, this is the place to go!

name: Martine Hammerstad
quote: Filip is a really good artist, he makes you feel comfterble during the session and he is funny lol, the tattoos always end up nice ❤️

name: Klerisa Ziko
quote: Jeg hadde en veldig god opplevelse hos Infinity Tattoo i Lørenskog. Filip er en utrolig flink tatovør som virkelig tar initiativ til å få deg til å føle deg trygg og komfortabel gjennom hele prosessen. Han forklarer godt og sørger for at du er sikker på at resultatet blir slik du ønsker. Tatoveringen gjorde nesten ikke vondt for meg, og han jobbet både raskt og veldig effektivt uten at det gikk utover kvaliteten. Jeg er utrolig fornøyd med resultatet og anbefaler ham virkelig videre!

name: Ymia Lap
quote: Fantastisk service. Ekstremt kompetent artist, gjør det akkurat som du vil ha det.

name: Kristi Rouko
quote: Amazing work! I’m very happy with both the result and the whole experience. He made me feel comfortable throughout the entire session, and you can really see the passion and attention to detail in what he does. Highly recommended! 10/10

name: Ibrahim Elias
quote: Veldig fornøyd med tatoveringen min! Profesjonell artist, rolig atmosfære og ekstremt nøye med detaljer. Anbefales på det sterkeste.

name: alexandra tsoup
quote: Clean studio, great atmosphere, and top-quality work. Attention to detail is next level, and the whole experience is smooth and comfortable. If you’re thinking about getting a tattoo, this is the place.

name: Petros Tzegias
quote: Absolutely amazing experience from start to finish. The studio is clean, welcoming, and has a great vibe. You can really see the passion and attention to detail in every piece. The artist takes the time to listen, make you feel comfortable, and deliver exactly what you’re imagining — if not better. Couldn’t be happier with the result. Highly recommended!

name: Deniz Olsrud
quote: Bare fine opplevelser når jeg har vært innom, fikk god hjelp til å finne design

name: danai kat
quote: For en fantastisk opplevelse! Artisten var superhyggelig, men også veldig profesjonell, og jeg følte meg komfortabel fra første øyeblikk. Jeg elsker tatoveringen min og kommer definitivt tilbake for den neste. Anbefales på det sterkeste! Such a great experience! The artist was super friendly but also very professional, and I felt comfortable from the first moment. I love my tattoo and I’ll definitely come back for the next one. Totally recommended!

name: basel yosf
quote: Kjempefornøyd med tatoveringen. Rent studio og hyggelig atmosfære. Anbefales på det sterkeste!

name: Joanna Gonkiewicz
quote: Kocham to miejsce za atmosferę❤️ nie lubisz tłumów ludzi i rozmow o niczym? Ten salon jest dla Ciebie. Filipo to bardzo przyjacielski i cierpliwy tatuażysta. Masz swoj pomysł i potrzebujesz go zmaterializować - on bedzie Ci czytal w myślach. Mój parter oddał mu kawałek swojej reki a dostal z powrotem kawał dobrej sztuki. Jesteśmy bardzo zadowoleni. Polecam ❤️🫶

name: Anestis Lekas
quote: Beautiful work!!! I love how you worked with the natural curves of the body for this placement. This linework is impossibly clean! 🔥 The saturation here is next level. Absolute masterclass in . I’ve been staring at this for five minutes—the detail is insane.

name: Βασίλης γκοζνταρης
quote: Absolutely incredible experience from start to finish. The studio is spotless, professional, and has such a welcoming atmosphere that you instantly feel comfortable. The artist took time to really listen to my idea, gave expert advice, and turned it into something even better than I imagined. The attention to detail, precision, and creativity were next level. You can truly see the passion and love for the art in their work. The tattoo healed beautifully and looks flawless. If you’re looking for top-quality work, professionalism, and an unforgettable experience, this is the place to go. I wouldn’t trust my skin with anyone else. 10/10, highly recommended.

name: Eldi Ibraima
quote: Best in town , very friendly and amazing job !!

name: Tammam Tahmaz
quote: An amazing experience in every sense! A very talented artist, easy to deal with, and the result is absolutely stunning. Highly recommended 100%.

name: Amal Almakawi
quote: He’s a true artist, the place is very clean, and he immediately understood exactly what I wanted—so I didn’t have to do anything except trust his design. ❤️

name: Ναταλια Σεριαναι
quote: My experience was perfect. The tattoo artist is very talented communicative and respectful. The result was amazing as well amd exactly how i had imagined it. I would recommend 100%

name: Hlias Hysos
quote: I had an amazing experience at this new tattoo studio. From the beginning, the communication with the artist was excellent. He took the time to understand exactly what I wanted and helped me make the right choices for the design, offering great advice and ideas!! For me that’s a great point by it self since a lot of as we have one idea but is not yet fully or even possible !! And he is there to help you and make the right choice!! The studio itself is new, very clean, and welcoming. The final result exceeded my expectations — the tattoo truly speaks for itself!! Highly recommended for anyone looking for a professional and creative tattoo artist!! Can’t wait to go back for more!!!!

name: Andrea Lie Rein
quote: Superfornøyd med tatoveringen! Flink og nøyaktig tatovør! Blei akkurat som eg håpa på🤩

name: Areti Anastasi
quote: Absolutely AMAZING experience! He is insanely talented and truly passionate about his work. The attention to detail is next level, the studio is super clean, and the whole vibe is so chill and welcoming. My tattoo turned out even better than I imagined—and I already have 3 more designs waiting to be done! ❤️ 1000% recommended!

name: Orestis Balla
quote: Went with my friend for him to get a tattoo. Amazing experience! Super chill and easy to talk to, but very serious about his work. Communication was effortless, he really cares about making everything perfect, and the final result was flawless. Highly recommend!

name: Panteleimon Mingko
quote: Amazing experience from start to finish. The studio was super clean, professional, and had a great vibe. The tattoo artist was very friendly, explained everything clearly, and made me feel comfortable throughout the whole process. The final result was exactly what I wanted, with great attention to detail and clean lines. I would definitely come back and highly recommend this studio to anyone looking for quality work.

name: Jornea Lila
quote: Great vibe, clean shop, friendly staff and amazing attention to detail ! 100% recommend :)

name: Selina
quote: Hadde en positiv opplevelse hos Infinity tattoo da artisten hjalp meg med designet og plasseringen av tatoveringen. Resultatet ble og supert! Anbefaler stedet.

name: Vasilis
quote: I recently got a tattoo at the newly opened Infinity Tattoo and am incredibly happy. The studio is clean, modern, and has a great atmosphere. My artist, Philippos, was excellent. He listened to my idea, created a perfect design, and executed it with incredible skill and precision. The entire experience was professional and comfortable from start to finish. I am in love with my new tattoo and the healing goes perfect. I will definitely be returning to Philippos and Infinity Tattoo for my next piece. Highly recommended

name: Sofia Taf
quote: I recently got my tattoo here and I honestly couldn’t be happier with the experience. From the very beginning, I felt comfortable and welcomed in a clean, professional, and safe environment. The artist was extremely professional, patient, and detail-oriented, taking the time to really understand what I wanted and offering helpful suggestions along the way. The final result exceeded my expectations, the design is clean, beautifully executed, and exactly what I had imagined (if not better!). Great attention to hygiene, excellent communication, and an overall amazing experience from start to finish. I will definitely be coming back and I highly recommend this place to anyone considering getting a tattoo, whether it’s your first one or not!

name: Thomas Nanos
quote: Legendary artist! Passionate and devoted at his art! Take his time and different approaches he can't be satisfied with leftovers and messy results he aims for great results and satisfying costumers! Great communication ,great hygiene ! And a cool guy that you want to visit him again! 10/10 !

name: Tom Null
quote: Amazing artist! Open minded with great ideas. Had a great communication and follow ups after the sessions. Professional and great hygiene are two words that describe his work. I can't suggest him enough 😊

name: Thomas Normann
quote: Veldig fornøyd med både tatoveringene og tatovøren! Profesjonell, dyktig og behagelig hele veien. Resultatet ble akkurat slik jeg ønsket meg. Jeg er veldig glad og har tatt hele & tatoveringer her! Anbefaler veldig!

name: Loukas Kanatsis
quote: Talent, work and soul in every tattoo! I highly recommend him!

name: Antreas Papas
quote: Infinity Tattoo er et veldig bra sted profesjonelle artister, rent miljø og fantastisk kvalitet på arbeidet. Anbefales på det sterkeste!

name: lazaros burnazi
quote: The tattoo studio is at its finest same with the artist. The negative comment with a 1 star review is completely fake and I can vouch that the artist has never infected nobody since I’ve seen him personally practice from day 1.

name: Giwrgos K.
quote: Δυστυχώς, η εμπειρία μου με το συγκεκριμένο τατουατζίδικο δεν ήταν καθόλου θετική. Η επικοινωνία με τον καλλιτέχνη ήταν εξαιρετικά ελλιπής, δεν υπήρχε σαφήνεια γύρω από τις διαδικασίες και τα σχέδια, και ένιωθα ότι δεν έδιναν την προσοχή που χρειαζόμουν για να βεβαιωθώ ότι το τατουάζ θα γίνει ακριβώς όπως το ήθελα. Μετά το τατουάζ, δυστυχώς παρουσίασα μόλυνση στην περιοχή, κάτι που με απογοήτευσε ακόμα περισσότερο. Είμαι πολύ απογοητευμένος από την όλη εμπειρία και δεν μπορώ να το συστήσω σε κανέναν.

name: Sidorel
quote: This guy is a confidence boost at its finest. The detail to his work is only proven with time and his quality work.
